name: Monaco Editor loads with syntax highlighting
description: When the user opens the editor tab, a Monaco Editor (VS Code-style editor) loads with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and the default HTML file content visible.

planSteps.description: Verify the editor view is active
Verify a Monaco Editor instance is visible in the main content area with line numbers on the left side
Verify the editor contains HTML code with syntax highlighting (colored tags, attributes, and strings)
Verify the editor has a cursor that can be placed by clicking
